channel.title: 感悟 on CSemy's blog
channel.description: Recent content in 感悟 on CSemy's blog

item.title: 初试OpenCV：图片预处理
item.description:
引入

市面上各种文档扫描软件早已屡见不鲜，背后的逻辑往往很复杂，但使用流行的Python第三方库OpenCV是否能解决此问题呢？下面的demo是我的一些小小尝试。

流程

因为不想在本地环境配置上浪费掉过多时间，故我直接选择了colab,想要本地配置的请自己准备好以下依赖（其它未测试版本不担保可用性） 


{
    python==3.11.11
    numpy==1.26.4,
    opencv-python== 4.11.0.86,
    matplotlib==3.10.0
}
下面正式进入处理环节。 

from google.colab import drive
drive.mount('/content/drive')



import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
"""这里为了代码可以在云端本地都轻松运行，故使用plt展示"""


def local_imshow(img, title='Image'):
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))
    if len(img.shape) == 2:
        plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray', vmin=0, vmax=255)
    else:
        plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))
    plt.title(title, fontsize=12)
    plt.axis('off')
    plt.show()


def process_image(image_path):
    # 加载图像
    image = cv2.imread(image_path)
    if image is None:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片加载失败，请检查路径：{image_path}")

    # ------------------- 预处理 -------------------
    # 灰度转换与白平衡
    gray = cv2.cvtColor(image, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    white_patch = cv2.resize(gray, (50, 50))
    white_value = np.percentile(white_patch, 90)
    adjusted = cv2.addWeighted(gray, 255/white_value, gray, 0, 0)
    adjusted = np.clip(adjusted, 0, 255).astype(np.uint8)

    # CLAHE对比度增强
    clahe = cv2.createCLAHE(clipLimit=4.0, tileGridSize=(16,16))
    enhanced = clahe.apply(adjusted)

    # ------------------- 旋转校正 -------------------
    def auto_rotate(img):
        # 形态学预处理
        kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_RECT, (5,5))
        morph = cv2.morphologyEx(img, cv2.MORPH_CLOSE, kernel)

        # 边缘检测与霍夫变换
        edges = cv2.Canny(morph, 50, 150, apertureSize=5)
        lines = cv2.HoughLinesP(edges, 1, np.pi/180, threshold=200,
                               minLineLength=img.shape[1]//3,
                               maxLineGap=50)

        # 安全检测
        if lines is None or len(lines) < 5:
            #print("警告：未检测到足够直线，跳过旋转")
            return img

        # 角度与权重计算
        angles = []
        weights = []
        for line in lines:
            x1, y1, x2, y2 = line[0]
            length = np.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + (y2-y1)**2)
            angle = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1))
            if abs(angle) < 45 and length > 50:
                angles.append(angle)
                weights.append(length)

        if len(angles) == 0:
            return img

        # 加权中位数计算
        weights = np.array(weights)
        repeats = (weights / 10).astype(int)
        repeats = np.clip(repeats, 1, None)
        weighted_median = np.median(np.repeat(angles, repeats))
        #print(f"检测到倾斜角度: {weighted_median:.2f}°")

        # 执行旋转
        (h, w) = img.shape
        center = (w // 2, h // 2)
        M = cv2.getRotationMatrix2D(center, weighted_median, 1.0)
        rotated = cv2.warpAffine(img, M, (w, h),
                                flags=cv2.INTER_CUBIC,
                                borderMode=cv2.BORDER_REPLICATE)
        return rotated

    rotated = auto_rotate(enhanced)

    # ------------------- 去噪与增强 -------------------
    # 非局部均值去噪
    denoised = cv2.fastNlMeansDenoising(rotated, None,
                                       h=10,
                                       templateWindowSize=7,
                                       searchWindowSize=21)

    # 保边锐化
    sharpen_kernel = np.array([[ 0, -0.5,  0],
                              [-0.5, 3.0, -0.5],
                              [ 0, -0.5,  0]], dtype=np.float32)
    sharpened = cv2.filter2D(denoised, -1, sharpen_kernel)

    # ------------------- 背景白化处理 -------------------
    def clean_background(img):
        # 双边滤波
        filtered = cv2.bilateralFilter(img, d=9,
                                      sigmaColor=75,
                                      sigmaSpace=75)

        # 自适应阈值处理
        binary = cv2.adaptiveThreshold(filtered, 255,
                                      cv2.ADAPTIVE_THRESH_GAUSSIAN_C,
                                      cv2.THRESH_BINARY_INV,
                                      blockSize=31,
                                      C=10)

        # 形态学优化
        kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_ELLIPSE, (3,3))
        opened = cv2.morphologyEx(binary, cv2.MORPH_OPEN, kernel, iterations=1)
        closed = cv2.morphologyEx(opened, cv2.MORPH_CLOSE, kernel, iterations=2)

        # 反转并去除黑边
        inverted = cv2.bitwise_not(closed)
        inverted[:5,:] = 255  # 上边缘
        inverted[-5:,:] = 255 # 下边缘
        inverted[:,:5] = 255  # 左边缘
        inverted[:,-5:] = 255 # 右边缘
        return inverted

    final_image = clean_background(sharpened)

    # ------------------- 后处理 -------------------
    def post_processing(img):
        # 连通域去噪
        n_labels, labels, stats, _ = cv2.connectedComponentsWithStats(img)

        cleaned = img.copy()
        for i in range(1, n_labels):
            if stats[i, cv2.CC_STAT_AREA] < 20:
                cleaned[labels == i] = 255

        # 边缘平滑
        blurred = cv2.GaussianBlur(cleaned, (3,3), 0)
        _, smoothed = cv2.threshold(blurred, 200, 255, cv2.THRESH_BINARY)
        return smoothed

    final_clean = post_processing(final_image)

    # ------------------- 可视化 -------------------
    plt.figure(figsize=(18, 12))

    steps = [
        (gray, '原始灰度图'),
        (enhanced, '对比度增强'),
        (rotated, '旋转校正'),
        (denoised, '非局部去噪'),
        (sharpened, '锐化增强'),
        (final_image, '背景白化'),
        (final_clean, '最终结果')
    ]

    for i, (img, title) in enumerate(steps, 1):
        plt.subplot(2, 4, i)
        plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray')
        plt.title(title, fontsize=10)
        plt.axis('off')

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    return final_clean


if __name__ == "__main__":
    image_path = "/content/drive/MyDrive/image/001.jpg"  # 修改为实际路径
    result = process_image(image_path)
    local_imshow(result, "最终优化结果")

这里给出一个样本成果,感觉还比较满意，但处理时间真的有点长（45s左右）
item.content:
引入

市面上各种文档扫描软件早已屡见不鲜，背后的逻辑往往很复杂，但使用流行的Python第三方库OpenCV是否能解决此问题呢？下面的demo是我的一些小小尝试。

流程

因为不想在本地环境配置上浪费掉过多时间，故我直接选择了colab,想要本地配置的请自己准备好以下依赖（其它未测试版本不担保可用性） 


{
    python==3.11.11
    numpy==1.26.4,
    opencv-python== 4.11.0.86,
    matplotlib==3.10.0
}
下面正式进入处理环节。 

from google.colab import drive
drive.mount('/content/drive')



import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
"""这里为了代码可以在云端本地都轻松运行，故使用plt展示"""


def local_imshow(img, title='Image'):
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))
    if len(img.shape) == 2:
        plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray', vmin=0, vmax=255)
    else:
        plt.imshow(cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB))
    plt.title(title, fontsize=12)
    plt.axis('off')
    plt.show()


def process_image(image_path):
    # 加载图像
    image = cv2.imread(image_path)
    if image is None:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"图片加载失败，请检查路径：{image_path}")

    # ------------------- 预处理 -------------------
    # 灰度转换与白平衡
    gray = cv2.cvtColor(image, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    white_patch = cv2.resize(gray, (50, 50))
    white_value = np.percentile(white_patch, 90)
    adjusted = cv2.addWeighted(gray, 255/white_value, gray, 0, 0)
    adjusted = np.clip(adjusted, 0, 255).astype(np.uint8)

    # CLAHE对比度增强
    clahe = cv2.createCLAHE(clipLimit=4.0, tileGridSize=(16,16))
    enhanced = clahe.apply(adjusted)

    # ------------------- 旋转校正 -------------------
    def auto_rotate(img):
        # 形态学预处理
        kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_RECT, (5,5))
        morph = cv2.morphologyEx(img, cv2.MORPH_CLOSE, kernel)

        # 边缘检测与霍夫变换
        edges = cv2.Canny(morph, 50, 150, apertureSize=5)
        lines = cv2.HoughLinesP(edges, 1, np.pi/180, threshold=200,
                               minLineLength=img.shape[1]//3,
                               maxLineGap=50)

        # 安全检测
        if lines is None or len(lines) < 5:
            #print("警告：未检测到足够直线，跳过旋转")
            return img

        # 角度与权重计算
        angles = []
        weights = []
        for line in lines:
            x1, y1, x2, y2 = line[0]
            length = np.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + (y2-y1)**2)
            angle = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1))
            if abs(angle) < 45 and length > 50:
                angles.append(angle)
                weights.append(length)

        if len(angles) == 0:
            return img

        # 加权中位数计算
        weights = np.array(weights)
        repeats = (weights / 10).astype(int)
        repeats = np.clip(repeats, 1, None)
        weighted_median = np.median(np.repeat(angles, repeats))
        #print(f"检测到倾斜角度: {weighted_median:.2f}°")

        # 执行旋转
        (h, w) = img.shape
        center = (w // 2, h // 2)
        M = cv2.getRotationMatrix2D(center, weighted_median, 1.0)
        rotated = cv2.warpAffine(img, M, (w, h),
                                flags=cv2.INTER_CUBIC,
                                borderMode=cv2.BORDER_REPLICATE)
        return rotated

    rotated = auto_rotate(enhanced)

    # ------------------- 去噪与增强 -------------------
    # 非局部均值去噪
    denoised = cv2.fastNlMeansDenoising(rotated, None,
                                       h=10,
                                       templateWindowSize=7,
                                       searchWindowSize=21)

    # 保边锐化
    sharpen_kernel = np.array([[ 0, -0.5,  0],
                              [-0.5, 3.0, -0.5],
                              [ 0, -0.5,  0]], dtype=np.float32)
    sharpened = cv2.filter2D(denoised, -1, sharpen_kernel)

    # ------------------- 背景白化处理 -------------------
    def clean_background(img):
        # 双边滤波
        filtered = cv2.bilateralFilter(img, d=9,
                                      sigmaColor=75,
                                      sigmaSpace=75)

        # 自适应阈值处理
        binary = cv2.adaptiveThreshold(filtered, 255,
                                      cv2.ADAPTIVE_THRESH_GAUSSIAN_C,
                                      cv2.THRESH_BINARY_INV,
                                      blockSize=31,
                                      C=10)

        # 形态学优化
        kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_ELLIPSE, (3,3))
        opened = cv2.morphologyEx(binary, cv2.MORPH_OPEN, kernel, iterations=1)
        closed = cv2.morphologyEx(opened, cv2.MORPH_CLOSE, kernel, iterations=2)

        # 反转并去除黑边
        inverted = cv2.bitwise_not(closed)
        inverted[:5,:] = 255  # 上边缘
        inverted[-5:,:] = 255 # 下边缘
        inverted[:,:5] = 255  # 左边缘
        inverted[:,-5:] = 255 # 右边缘
        return inverted

    final_image = clean_background(sharpened)

    # ------------------- 后处理 -------------------
    def post_processing(img):
        # 连通域去噪
        n_labels, labels, stats, _ = cv2.connectedComponentsWithStats(img)

        cleaned = img.copy()
        for i in range(1, n_labels):
            if stats[i, cv2.CC_STAT_AREA] < 20:
                cleaned[labels == i] = 255

        # 边缘平滑
        blurred = cv2.GaussianBlur(cleaned, (3,3), 0)
        _, smoothed = cv2.threshold(blurred, 200, 255, cv2.THRESH_BINARY)
        return smoothed

    final_clean = post_processing(final_image)

    # ------------------- 可视化 -------------------
    plt.figure(figsize=(18, 12))

    steps = [
        (gray, '原始灰度图'),
        (enhanced, '对比度增强'),
        (rotated, '旋转校正'),
        (denoised, '非局部去噪'),
        (sharpened, '锐化增强'),
        (final_image, '背景白化'),
        (final_clean, '最终结果')
    ]

    for i, (img, title) in enumerate(steps, 1):
        plt.subplot(2, 4, i)
        plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray')
        plt.title(title, fontsize=10)
        plt.axis('off')

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    return final_clean


if __name__ == "__main__":
    image_path = "/content/drive/MyDrive/image/001.jpg"  # 修改为实际路径
    result = process_image(image_path)
    local_imshow(result, "最终优化结果")

这里给出一个样本成果,感觉还比较满意，但处理时间真的有点长（45s左右）

item.title: 缘起
item.description:
缘起在人群中看你，缘落看你在人群中

今日终于历经千帆，将个人博客从零搭建完成。回望去年初秋刚入学时，我曾在"是否要创建博客"的抉择中反复徘徊——既渴望通过文字沉淀思考，又畏惧持续输出的压力，更在技术门槛前踌躇不前。而今推开代码迷雾，调试过两三个主题模板，与命令行报错鏖战整宿后，才真正领悟到：拖延的本质是对未知的恐惧，而突破的关键在于行动的勇气。

选择以日更为誓约，既是对抗惰性的利剑，亦是自我成长的阶梯。正如古罗马哲人塞涅卡所言：“生命并非短促，而是我们荒废太多。“日更不仅是写作习惯的养成，更是思维逻辑的淬炼场：当日常灵感化作系统化思考，当零碎感悟沉淀为结构性认知，这种持续输出的过程恰似铸剑师反复锤炼精钢。更期待与读者的思想碰撞中，激荡出新的认知维度，让文字成为连通世界的密钥。

深知这条路上布满荆棘——灵感枯竭的深夜、数据惨淡的清晨、自我怀疑的黄昏。我愿将每个写作瓶颈视为破茧契机，把每篇稚嫩文字当作攀登阶梯，在持续输出中打磨思维的锋芒。这既是对抗浮躁时代的锚点，更是丈量生命厚度的标尺。

“只应今日爱山意，便是他时傲世因。“此刻埋首耕耘的每个字符，都是未来精神世界的筑基之石。当量变积累触发质变飞跃，当零散篇章串联成知识图谱，这场孤独的文字远征终将化作璀璨星轨。愿以此刻为始，在日更的修行中见天地、见众生、见自己。
item.content:
缘起在人群中看你，缘落看你在人群中

今日终于历经千帆，将个人博客从零搭建完成。回望去年初秋刚入学时，我曾在"是否要创建博客"的抉择中反复徘徊——既渴望通过文字沉淀思考，又畏惧持续输出的压力，更在技术门槛前踌躇不前。而今推开代码迷雾，调试过两三个主题模板，与命令行报错鏖战整宿后，才真正领悟到：拖延的本质是对未知的恐惧，而突破的关键在于行动的勇气。

选择以日更为誓约，既是对抗惰性的利剑，亦是自我成长的阶梯。正如古罗马哲人塞涅卡所言：“生命并非短促，而是我们荒废太多。“日更不仅是写作习惯的养成，更是思维逻辑的淬炼场：当日常灵感化作系统化思考，当零碎感悟沉淀为结构性认知，这种持续输出的过程恰似铸剑师反复锤炼精钢。更期待与读者的思想碰撞中，激荡出新的认知维度，让文字成为连通世界的密钥。

深知这条路上布满荆棘——灵感枯竭的深夜、数据惨淡的清晨、自我怀疑的黄昏。我愿将每个写作瓶颈视为破茧契机，把每篇稚嫩文字当作攀登阶梯，在持续输出中打磨思维的锋芒。这既是对抗浮躁时代的锚点，更是丈量生命厚度的标尺。

“只应今日爱山意，便是他时傲世因。“此刻埋首耕耘的每个字符，都是未来精神世界的筑基之石。当量变积累触发质变飞跃，当零散篇章串联成知识图谱，这场孤独的文字远征终将化作璀璨星轨。愿以此刻为始，在日更的修行中见天地、见众生、见自己。
